elements.label: Description
elements.value: Only tiers 0-4 can spawn. Weights: Cherry 35%, Strawberry 28%, Grape 20%, Orange 12%, Persimmon 5%. Larger tiers must be earned through merging.

onChange.template:
[Gameplan: update .gameplan/gameplay/properties/spawn_rules.schema.json, set srp_cherry_w to {{srp_cherry_w}}]
Set Cherry spawn weight to {{srp_cherry_w}}.

[Gameplan: update .gameplan/gameplay/properties/spawn_rules.schema.json, set srp_straw_w to {{srp_straw_w}}]
Set Strawberry spawn weight to {{srp_straw_w}}.

[Gameplan: update .gameplan/gameplay/properties/spawn_rules.schema.json, set srp_grape_w to {{srp_grape_w}}]
Set Grape spawn weight to {{srp_grape_w}}.

[Gameplan: update .gameplan/gameplay/properties/spawn_rules.schema.json, set srp_orange_w to {{srp_orange_w}}]
Set Orange spawn weight to {{srp_orange_w}}.

[Gameplan: update .gameplan/gameplay/properties/spawn_rules.schema.json, set srp_pers_w to {{srp_pers_w}}]
Set Persimmon spawn weight to {{srp_pers_w}}.
